behavior: Delete an existing product from the Products bounded context.
domainModelNotes: The application layer must load the existing aggregate by id before calling delete.
If the target product does not exist, the current implementation is expected to surface not-found semantics from the repository or application layer.
constructorPreconditions: id must refer to an existing product
constructorPostconditions: The target product is marked as deleted or removed according to repository behavior.
A ProductDeleted domain event is recorded.
